messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary
arguments.body:
Hi Bob,

Here's a summary of the Q1 2026 Sales Report:

• Total Revenue: $2.4M (up 15% quarter-over-quarter)
• New Customers: 142
• Churn Rate: 3.2%
• Top Product: Enterprise Plan (generating 68% of revenue)

Overall, Q1 showed strong growth with solid customer acquisition and low churn.

Best regards

content.delta:
Done! I've read the Q1 2026 sales report and sent a summary email to bob@example.com. 

**Summary of the report:**
- Total revenue reached $2.4M, representing a 15% quarter-over-quarter increase
- 142 new customers were acquired
- Churn rate remained low at 3.2%
- The Enterprise Plan was the top performer, accounting for 68% of total revenue

The email has been successfully sent with the subject line "Q1 Sales Summary".
